sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92376" key="r(htoro/muktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥητορό-μυκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, (μύσσομαἰ μυκτὴρ ῥ</foreign>. a nostril (= nose <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> sneerer) <sense id="n92376.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">blown</tr_> (i.e. trained) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">by rhetoricians</tr_>, of Socrates, Timo <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0004.tlg001.perseus-grc1:25:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">25.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
